parameters.query: INSERT INTO invoice_log (zalo_user_id, zalo_msg_id, supplier_code, source_type, source_url, parsed_data, status, decision_status, decision_payload, created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.zalo_user_id}}', '{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}', '{{$json.invoice_meta.supplier_code || 'UNKNOWN_SUPPLIER'}}', 'image', 'draft://kiotviet/{{$json.draft_po_id}}', jsonb_build_object('mapped_count', {{$json.mapped_items.length}}, 'unmapped_count', {{$json.unmapped_items.length}}, 'overall_confidence', {{$json.confidence_meta.overall_confidence || 0}}), 'draft', 'pending', jsonb_build_object('draft_po_id', {{$json.draft_po_id}}, 'draft_po_code', '{{$json.draft_po_code || ''}}', 'total', {{$json.total_amount}}), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id, zalo_msg_id) WHERE zalo_msg_id IS NOT NULL DO UPDATE SET status='draft', decision_status='pending', decision_payload=EXCLUDED.decision_payload, source_url=EXCLUDED.source_url, parsed_data=EXCLUDED.parsed_data;

INSERT INTO user_sessions (zalo_user_id, session_state, context_data, expires_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{$json.zalo_user_id}}', 'waiting_for_draft_confirm', jsonb_build_object('zalo_msg_id', '{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}', 'draft_po_id', {{$json.draft_po_id}}, 'draft_po_code', '{{$json.draft_po_code || ''}}', 'invoice_ref', '{{$json.zalo_msg_id}}'), NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (zalo_user_id) DO UPDATE SET session_state='waiting_for_draft_confirm', context_data=EXCLUDED.context_data, expires_at=EXCLUDED.expires_at, updated_at=NOW();

parameters.jsCode:
const base = `${$json.zalo_user_id}|${$json.zalo_msg_id}|${$json.draft_po_id}`;
return [{ json: { ...$json, zalo_message: { recipient: { user_id: $json.zalo_user_id }, message: { text: $json.summary }, buttons: [ { title: '✅ Approve PO', payload: `DRAFT_APPROVE|${base}` }, { title: '❌ Reject', payload: `DRAFT_REJECT|${base}` }, { title: '✏️ Edit', payload: `DRAFT_EDIT|${base}` } ] } } }];
